ocr_findings.description: Inline ruby annotation 'くみあわせ' shown as furigana over '組合せ' in image is folded into the parenthetical '（くみあわせ）' in OCR text — acceptable rendering difference.
Image shows 'コレが出る！' banner text in sidebar; OCR captures it under '試験にはコレが出る！' heading — minor presentation difference, content preserved.

reviewer_notes: Page covers combinatorics (組合せ) with formula derivation, a worked example table, and a 'コレが出る' exam tip box. OCR faithfully captures all math notation, the combination table structure, and the sidebar formulas. No text losses or character substitution errors detected.
